name: xAI Grok
notes: OpenAI-compatible endpoints; chat completions, images; large context models (e.g., grok-4-0709).

name: OpenAI
notes: Text, vision, and reasoning models; conforms to OpenAI SDK schema.

name: Anthropic (Claude)
notes: Claude models; messages API with required version header.

name: Google Gemini
notes: Gemini 1.5 Pro and family; JSON REST; vision + long context.

name: Replicate
notes: Run community models via hosted endpoints; async jobs & webhooks.

name: Eden AI
notes: Unified API for multiple providers; text, vision, audio.

name: Coinbase
notes: Retail API; for Exchange/Advanced Trade use product-specific headers.

name: CoinGecko
notes: Crypto prices/metadata; rate limits apply; free tier.

name: WorldTimeAPI
notes: Public timezones and timestamps; no auth.

name: Pixabay
notes: Stock images/videos; free tier with attribution guidelines.

name: Cloudflare Workers AI
notes: Edge-run models via Workers AI; account-scoped endpoint.

name: Zapier NLA
notes: Natural Language Actions to run Zaps directly.

name: RapidAPI (Gateway)
notes: Gateway to many 3rd-party APIs; per-service host header required.

name: Sovereign API Dashboard
notes: FastAPI microservice (v4.2) orchestrating external APIs; includes monetization and AURA Engine v2.0 hooks.

name: Transparency Dashboard
notes: Immutable, append-only logs for actions and API calls.

name: Node Empowerment API
notes: Sovereign controls: role bindings, permissions, ritual gates.
